emails.subject: March 21st Meeting
emails.body: March 21st Meeting Tana: I was hoping that as part of our next group meeting on the 21st you could put something together with respect to the various seminars that we hope to have with the different groups that we work with as I would very much like to start setting dates for these seminars with the hope that they could be completed before I go on maternity leave. Is that do-able? Carol
